name: western-pasta-carbonara
input: a plate of spaghetti carbonara with pancetta, egg yolk, pecorino, and black pepper
notes: Roman pasta dish. USDA FoodData Central: 100g dry spaghetti (~360 kcal), 30g pancetta (~135 kcal), 1 egg yolk (~55 kcal), 25g pecorino (~95 kcal). ~700–750 kcal range typical. Advisory tier — pancetta:egg ratio varies.
